name: FIS
description: FIS — Global financial technology company providing payment processing, banking software, and acquiring for enterprises and FIs.

seo.title: FIS — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: FIS: FIS — Global financial technology company providing payment processing, banking software, and acquiring for enterprises and FIs.

when_to_use: Enterprise payment processing and acquiring for large retail and FI clients
Banking software and payment infrastructure for global financial institutions
Merchant acquiring solutions at enterprise scale with global compliance
Card network integration and settlement services for banks and processors

cons: Developer experience well behind modern PSPs
review.verdict: Enterprise-only choice where regulated scale matters — developers building modern products should look elsewhere.
review.best_for: Banks and large enterprises needing full-stack regulated infrastructure
review.not_for: Startups, SMBs, or any team wanting fast self-serve integration

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
